message:
test(connectors): add comprehensive error and type test suites for 11 connectors

Add ~3,800 lines of test coverage across 13 connector files covering
error handling, serde roundtrips, and FCP error mapping.

Each connector error.rs gets a full test module covering:
- Display trait output for every error variant
- is_retryable() classification (rate limits, 5xx, timeouts vs 400, auth)
- retry_after() Duration extraction from rate-limit errors
- to_fcp_error() mapping to unified FcpError enum
- From impls (serde_json::Error -> ConnectorError)
- std::error::Error trait object compatibility

Connector error suites: Anthropic (+314), Browser (+175), Figma (+275),
GoogleAI (+163), Jira (+220), Linear (+211), Plaid (+329), S3 (+308),
Stripe (+178), YouTube (+371), Zendesk (+169).

Type serde suites:
- plaid/types.rs (+316): roundtrip tests for Account, Transaction,
  Holding, Security, Liability, PlaidItem, LinkTokenResponse, etc.
- youtube/types.rs (+302): roundtrip tests for SearchResult, Video,
  Channel, Playlist, CommentThread, CaptionTrack, ApiErrorResponse, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
